Project 3

Author

Yuan Xie (3038930130)

The main goal in this project is to craft a story around salaries of NBA players and payrolls of NBA teams in season 2024-2025.

  1. We are going to draw one graph to visualize the salary distribution of all players. We divide the salary by 1000000 to make the graph look easier.
  1. This is the table with summary statistics of salaries among all players.
  1. This is a table showing the top-10 highest-paid players (name, team, position, salary).
  1. This is a graph that explores the relationship between salary and experience. Since the slope is positive, there may be a positive relationship between salary and experience.
  1. This is a graph that ranks the teams by salaries.
  1. My own exploratory analysis: Salary Distribution Across Player Positions

Observation: PG has the greatest salary spread while the rest four positions have outliers. However, the median salary is relatively similar across positions.
